description: Create a rectangle from a corner point, width, and height. The corner must be a point variable or inline point() expression. Automatically generates four vertices and four edges accessible by index.
utility: Create rectangle from corner point, width, and height

arguments.name: corner
arguments.description: Top-left corner as a point variable or point(G, x, y) expression

arguments.name: width
arguments.description: Width of rectangle (extends right from corner). Must be positive.

arguments.name: height
arguments.description: Height of rectangle (extends down from corner). Must be positive.

alternates.description: Rectangle with corner at point variable P
Colored rectangle with stroke and fill

examples.scenario: Extract an edge as a line segment
